message:
feat(sql): add window functions to fused code generation

Implement two-phase code generation for window functions (ROW_NUMBER,
RANK, DENSE_RANK, LAG, LEAD) in the compiled execution path.

Architecture:
- Phase 1: Pre-compute window values before main loop
- Phase 2: Access pre-computed values in fused filter/project loop

Changes:
- Add WindowFuncInfo struct and tracking fields to FusedCodeGen
- Implement analyzePlan for window nodes with partition/order columns
- Generate window computation helper functions with sort context
- Add window buffer declarations in function preamble
- Update genExpr to use window_{name}[i] for window columns
- Include window columns in OutputBuffers and buildLayout
- Add unit tests for window column tracking and expression generation
